title: Citrusy Gooey Canadian Kale Stir-fry
description: This Citrusy Gooey Canadian Kale Stir-fry is a brunch-friendly dish featuring kale cooked until gooey and infused with citrus flavors for a burst of freshness.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sunflower oil or vegan butter.
If using bacon, cook until crispy and set aside. If not, skip this step.
Add onions to the skillet, cook for about 2 minutes until softened. Stir in broccoli and bell peppers.
Fold kale into the pan with a bit of water to prevent sticking. Add lemon balm leaves if using.
Pour in lemon juice and gently toss everything together. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Add jalapeno slices for an extra kick (optional).
After about 5-7 minutes, reduce heat to medium and stir in nutritional yeast to create a gooey texture (if desired).
Serve hot as a side dish or on toast/pancakes.
Enjoy your citrusy kale with a squeeze of fresh lemon.
